scope: Admin panel block JSON editing component
Role-based access control for Advanced Content Editor role
JSON structure validation to prevent schema changes
Block isolation for editing (only current block affected)
assumptions: The Advanced Content Editor role needs to be added to the role system (currently only Admin and Student exist)
Block data is stored as JSON in Exercises, Pages, and/or Posts collections
There's an existing block edit view or component where the JSON edit can be attached
The existing AdvancedJsonPanel component can be reused as reference pattern
review_questions: Does the Advanced Content Editor role need to be created, or does it already exist?
Which collection(s) have the blocks that need this feature - Exercises, Pages, Posts, or all of them?
Is there an existing block edit component/view where the Raw JSON Edit option can be integrated?
complexity_reasoning: Scope: 12 (multi-file admin component + access control). Risk: 12 (access control + data validation). Novelty: 8 (building on existing AdvancedJsonPanel). Cross-domain: 8 (frontend + backend access control). Ambiguity: 2 (clear requirements). Dependencies: 3 (uses existing patterns). Total: 45 - Complex tier

input_quality.reasoning: Input contains ## Core Requirements with 4 detailed requirements and ## Acceptance Criteria with 7 checkable items. Clear user intent and scope. Promoted spec.md will capture requirements and acceptance criteria for downstream stages.
